interaction_phrase: promote quantum technology in
occurrence_sentence: The Quantum Technology Alliance Baden-Würt-temberg, QuantumBW for short, is an initiative that has been set up to promote quantum technology in THE LÄND — Germany's federal state of Baden-Würt-temberg.

interaction_phrase: pooling the unique scientific and economic expertise available in
occurrence_sentence: To help shape the quantum revolution, QuantumBW is pooling the unique scien­tific and economic expertise available in Europe's no. 1 region for innovation THE LÄND.

interaction_phrase: networks of excellence in quantum science already established at universities
occurrence_sentence: Thanks to networks of excellence in quantum science already established at universities and non-university research institutions, as well as high-tech companies and start-ups, our state is predestined to play crucial roles in national and European initiatives in quantum technologies, to develop successful and profitable products and services, and to conquer the emerging markets for quantum technologies.

interaction_phrase: QuantumBW is an initiative in which leading research institutions and enterprises in our state are joining forces
occurrence_sentence: QuantumBW is an initiative in which leading research institutions and enterprises in our state are joining forces to strategically develop Baden-Württemberg as a science and business hub for quantum technologies and to grow its international visibility as a quantum centre.

interaction_phrase: leading research institutions and enterprises in our state are joining forces
occurrence_sentence: QuantumBW is an initiative in which leading research institutions and enterprises in our state are joining forces to strategically develop Baden-Württemberg as a science and business hub for quantum technologies and to grow its international visibility as a quantum centre.

interaction_phrase: the Competence Center Quantum Computing Baden-Württemberg (KQCBW)
occurrence_sentence: Among the flagship initiatives with a supra-regional lighthouse character that have already been or are being funded by the state — in many cases together with the federal government — are, for example, the Center for Integrated Quantum Science and Technology (IQST) based in Ulm and Stuttgart, the Competence Center Quantum Computing Baden-Württemberg (KQCBW) and the future cluster "QSens — Quantum Sensors of the Future" (part of the Clusters4Future initiative).

interaction_phrase: the future cluster "QSens — Quantum Sensors of the Future"
occurrence_sentence: Among the flagship initiatives with a supra-regional lighthouse character that have already been or are being funded by the state — in many cases together with the federal government — are, for example, the Center for Integrated Quantum Science and Technology (IQST) based in Ulm and Stuttgart, the Competence Center Quantum Computing Baden-Württemberg (KQCBW) and the future cluster "QSens — Quantum Sensors of the Future" (part of the Clusters4Future initiative).

interaction_phrase: the exchange of knowledge with high-tech companies in THE LÄND
occurrence_sentence: These joint research projects meld basic and applied research in the field of quantum technology across the various locations and foster the exchange of knowledge with high-tech companies in THE LÄND.

interaction_phrase: an excellent network of super-computing centres in THE LÄND
occurrence_sentence: major synergies are expected between quantum computing, classic high-performance computing (HPC) and machine learning that can be optimally developed by an excellent network of super-computing centres in THE LÄND and Cyber Valley — as an international hotspot for artificial intelligence — and then exploited.

interaction_phrase: Cyber Valley — as an international hotspot for artificial intelligence — and then exploited
occurrence_sentence: major synergies are expected between quantum computing, classic high-performance computing (HPC) and machine learning that can be optimally developed by an excellent network of super-computing centres in THE LÄND and Cyber Valley — as an international hotspot for artificial intelligence — and then exploited.

interaction_phrase: strengths of our universities
occurrence_sentence: Building on the strengths of our universities and research institutions as important drivers of new technological innovations, companies and start-ups from THE LÄND are to operate as key providers and users in the global market for quantum solutions.

interaction_phrase: QuantumBW innovation initiative
occurrence_sentence: As part of the QuantumBW innovation initiative, we want to ensure that Baden-Württemberg continues to play a leading role in value creation with new quantum solutions.

interaction_phrase: strengths of our universities
occurrence_sentence: Building on the strengths of our universities and research institutions as important drivers of new technological innovations, companies and start-ups from THE LÄND are to operate as key providers and users in the global market for quantum solutions.

occurrence_sentence: Building on the strengths of our universities and research institutions as important drivers of new technological innovations, companies and start-ups from THE LÄND are to operate as key providers and users in the global market for quantum solutions.

interaction_phrase: representatives of leading quantum research institutions and enterprises
occurrence_sentence: Representatives of leading quantum research institutions and enterprises have come together behind this common goal and, in a broad-based exchange and coordination process, have identified key spheres of action for a strategy to further develop Baden-Württemberg as a quantum technology hub.

interaction_phrase: scientific institutions and businesses
occurrence_sentence: The resulting intertwined network of scientific institutions and businesses forms the nucleus for the long-term development of a new innovation campus for quantum technologies, in which innovative collaborative frameworks and spaces in which science and industry can interact as mutual drivers are sustainably anchored.

interaction_phrase: in the state
occurrence_sentence: the prospects for quantum sensor technology in the state successfully embracing the entire value chain, from potential users to manufacturers of key enabling technologies, and translating research results into concrete applications and products are already good.

interaction_phrase: in THE LÄND
occurrence_sentence: Innovative companies and start-ups in Baden-Württemberg are already actively pioneering the industrialization and commercialization of quantum sensors on a huge scale. Our companies and institutions are leaders in this area, a position we want to expand further.

interaction_phrase: in Baden-Württemberg
occurrence_sentence: Representatives of leading quantum research institutions and enterprises have come together behind this common goal and, in a broad-based exchange and coordination process, have identified key spheres of action for a strategy to further develop Baden-Württemberg as a quantum technology hub.

interaction_phrase: scientific institutions
occurrence_sentence: The resulting intertwined network of scientific institutions and businesses forms the nucleus for the long-term development of a new innovation campus for quantum technologies, in which innovative collaborative frameworks and spaces in which science and industry can interact as mutual drivers are sustainably anchored.

interaction_phrase: in Baden-Württemberg
occurrence_sentence: The development of quantum technologies is a highly competitive field of research that requires strong cross-institutional and interdisciplinary networks in order to be competitive in the global market.

interaction_phrase: in Baden-Württemberg
occurrence_sentence: The QuantumBW Office will also represent Baden-Württemberg to the outside world as a quantum technology hub and help to make Baden-Württemberg's quantum ecosystem and existing expertise more visible under the QuantumBW umbrella.

interaction_phrase: within the framework of QuantumBW
occurrence_sentence: Within the framework of QuantumBW, models for shared, more efficient utilization of the existing building and equipment infrastructures available in the state are to be established on the basis of a comprehensive appraisal, and these infrastructures are to be specifically supplemented and expanded based on the technology roadmaps.

interaction_phrase: interlinking excellent university teaching and business practice
occurrence_sentence: QuantumBW will therefore also establish itself as a platform for the coordinated development, promotion and retention of specialists for science and industry and develop concepts for the sustainable promotion of talent by interlinking excellent university teaching and business practice.

interaction_phrase: existing curricula and graduate programs at Baden-Württemberg's universities
occurrence_sentence: Existing curricula and graduate programs at Baden-Württemberg's universities can serve as a starting point for establishing a state-wide education and training network.

interaction_phrase: the creation of uniform, state-wide standards for university education
occurrence_sentence: In particular, the creation of uniform, state-wide standards for university education at bachelor's and master's level, and for doctorates, too, offers the opportunity to train highly qualified quantum specialists as a sustainable resource for the local economy.

interaction_phrase: the set up of new professorships or junior research groups specializing in quantum technology engineering
occurrence_sentence: The set up of new professorships or junior research groups specializing in quantum technology engineering and possibly, in the future, in computer science, too, holds the potential to build bridges between the various disciplines.

interaction_phrase: the future cluster QSens and the Competence Center Quantum Computing Baden-Württemberg already have relevant programs in place
occurrence_sentence: With regard to continuing professional development, the future cluster QSens and the Competence Center Quantum Computing Baden-Württemberg already have relevant programs in place.

interaction_phrase: the future cluster QSens and the Competence Center Quantum Computing Baden-Württemberg already have relevant programs in place
occurrence_sentence: With regard to continuing professional development, the future cluster QSens and the Competence Center Quantum Computing Baden-Württemberg already have relevant programs in place.

interaction_phrase: the committees within the governing body of QuantumBW — the Executive Board
occurrence_sentence: Guided by the framework of these four fields of action for the promotion of quantum technologies in Baden-Württemberg and the targets formulated in the technology roadmaps, the committees within the governing body of QuantumBW — the Executive Board, supported by the Advisory Board and the Office — will prioritize and shape concrete implementation steps and measures in a timely manner.

interaction_phrase: the QuantumBW Office will play an important role as a central point of contact for interested parties
occurrence_sentence: The aim must therefore be to bundle these activities in order to gain maximum benefit. Here too, the QuantumBW Office will play an important role as a central point of contact for interested parties.

interaction_phrase: the QuantumBW Office will play an important role as a central point of contact for interested parties
occurrence_sentence: The aim must therefore be to bundle these activities in order to gain maximum benefit. Here too, the QuantumBW Office will play an important role as a central point of contact for interested parties.

interaction_phrase: the governing body of QuantumBW
occurrence_sentence: This is intended to provide the players in the governing body of QuantumBW with a coherent and binding schedule for the next implementation steps, based on input from foremost experts.

interaction_phrase: the state's universities and non-university research institutions
occurrence_sentence: QuantumBW focuses on translating outstanding research findings achieved by the state's universities and non-university research institutions into concrete applications and regional value chains.

interaction_phrase: the state's activities
occurrence_sentence: synchronize the state's activities with the relevant national and international roadmaps

interaction_phrase: within the organisational structure of QuantumBW
occurrence_sentence: Within the organisational structure of QuantumBW, these roadmaps will be regularly reviewed and updated by the Executive Board, supported by the Advisory Board and the Head Office.

interaction_phrase: in THE LÄND
occurrence_sentence: Further focal points in THE LÄND are to be found in the areas of materials research — with a key focus on 2D materials — for sensor technology, enabling technologies such as microelectronics, photonics and microhybrid assembly and connection technology, as well as in combining these quantum sensors with conventional sensor technology (hybrid sensors) and AI.

interaction_phrase: managed by the local universities and institutes of the Innovation Alliance Baden-Württemberg
occurrence_sentence: Low-threshold access to relevant measurement and laboratory equipment will be created for all partners at the locations and across regions; the equipment will be managed by the local universities and institutes of the Innovation Alliance Baden-Württemberg (innBW).

occurrence_sentence: The same applies to access to structures from other major national projects, such as the Fraunhofer Research Fab Microelectronics Germany (FMD), the DLR Quantum Computing Initiative or the IQST.

occurrence_sentence: For Q2/2024, continuation of the scientific projects scheduled for 2024–2027, with a focus on the software use cases established through research First quick checks/exploring projects where it already makes sense to promote SMEs In the process, establish a link to hybrid quantum computing in particular and, where technically feasible, quantum machine learning For Q2/2024, delivery of a new generation of centralized quantum computer hardware and parallel access to comparable technologies Integration of relevant partners into the overall structure of the cluster; for the universities: establishment of permanent positions for access, support of the network infrastructure through known activities at the universities, but also at the research institutions (Fraunhofer-Gesellschaft, IQST), and the establishment/addition of new infrastructure, e.g. technology
